'''Lus-ma''' was a form of [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] [[Lightsaber combat/Legends|combat]] which [[Count of Serenno/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] taught [[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]] and his [[IG-100 MagnaGuard/Legends|IG-100 MagnaGuards]]. Like [[Sokan]], Lus-ma was not part of the classic combat forms of the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], but its lightsaber moves and ideals are akin to those of [[Form III/Legends|Form III]].<ref name="Labyrinth of Evil" />

==Behind the scenes==
Next to nothing is known about Lus-ma. When Grievous trained with his guards in ''[[Labyrinth of Evil]]'', it was the only time Lus-ma was mentioned: that Dooku observed they used Lus-ma to answer a [[Form III/Legends|Soresu]] move.

==Appearances==
*''[[Labyrinth of Evil]]''
